pages.text: $(bold)PreFabs$() (Prefabricated Factories) are upgraded Compact Machine blocks that act as cross-dimensional conduits between the Overworld and your factory dimension.

pages.title: The Three-Block System
pages.text: $(li)$(bold)PreFab Block$() (Overworld) - Routes resources, controls state machine, no internal storage $(li)$(bold)Importer Block$() (CM dimension) - Input gate, actively pushes items into adjacent inventories $(li)$(bold)Exporter Block$() (CM dimension) - Output gate, actively pulls items from adjacent inventories$(br2)Tip: $(bold)Best Practice$(): Use intermediate chests between Importers/Exporters and machines for more reliable systems

pages.title: State Machine
pages.text: BUILDING    → Player configures faces, places Importers/Exporters SIMULATING  → PreFab measures actual production rates (CM chunks LOADED) CACHED      → PreFab simulates production mathematically (CM chunks UNLOADED ← Performance) HALTED      → Input starved or output blocked (CM stays unloaded, player fixes Overworld side)
